title: helianthemum × pallidiflorum
intro: Helianthemum × pallidiflorum, also known as rockrose, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Helianthemum nummularium and Helianthemum alpestre. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and other minor injuries. The health benefits of rockrose include its ability to improve circulation, reduce stress and anxiety, and even act as a natural pain reliever, due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. Rockrose can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
